title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime with the help of Lieutenant Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster, and his wife intertwine in tales of violence and redemption.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson through the eyes of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Avengers Endgame
overview: The Avengers assemble once more to reverse the damage caused by Thanos and restore balance to the universe.

title: Titanic
overview: A seventeen year old aristocrat falls in love with a poor artist aboard the luxurious ill-fated RMS Titanic.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince is cast out of his pride by his cruel uncle, who claims he killed his father.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll feels threatened when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as a kid's favorite toy.

title: Joker
overview: A failed comedian descends into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

title: Parasite
overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Whiplash
overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing.

title: Gladiator
overview: A betrayed Roman general seeks revenge against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: Coco
overview: Aspiring musician Miguel enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather and return before sunrise.

title: The Social Network
overview: Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, facing legal battles.

title: Get Out
overview: A young African-American man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and discovers a disturbing secret.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more.

title: Oppenheimer
overview: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz musician and an aspiring actress fall in love in Los Angeles while pursuing their dreams.

title: Dune
overview: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control over the galaxy's most valuable asset while its heir becomes prophesied to lead.

title: Top Gun Maverick
overview: After more than thirty years of service as top naval aviator Maverick is called to train a detachment of graduates for a special assignment.

title: The Batman
overview: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld to expose the truth about corruption while confronting a sadistic killer known as the Riddler.

title: Avatar
overview: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora falls in love with a native and must choose between following orders and protecting the planet.

title: Knives Out
overview: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric and dysfunctional family.

title: Dunkirk
overview: Allied soldiers from Belgium the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German Army and evacuated during a desperate battle.

title: Black Panther
overview: T'Challa returns home to Wakanda to take his rightful place as king only to find his sovereignty challenged by a long-shadow foe.

title: The Prestige
overview: Two stage magicians in turn-of-the-century London engage in a competitive battle and attempt to create the ultimate stage illusion.

title: Django Unchained
overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
overview: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort from his rise to a wealthy stock-broker living the high life to his fall involving crime and corruption.

title: Schindler's List
overview: In German-occupied Poland during World War II industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.

title: Goodfellas
overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners.

title: Mad Max Fury Road
overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners.

title: 3 Idiots
overview: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion. They revisit their college days and recall the memories of their friend who inspired them.

title: Dangal
overview: Former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat trains his daughters Geeta and Babita to become world-class wrestlers despite societal resistance.

title: PK
overview: An alien on Earth loses the remote control device he needs to communicate with his spaceship and must find it to get back home.

title: Lagaan
overview: The people of a small village in Victorian India stake their future on a game of cricket against their ruthless British rulers.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
overview: Three friends decide to turn their fantasy trip into reality. Along the way they confront their deepest fears and personal demons.

title: Gully Boy
overview: A street rapper from the slums of Mumbai chases his dream of becoming a professional rapper despite his tough circumstances.

title: Andhadhun
overview: A series of events turn the life of a blind pianist upside down after he agrees to play at the home of a former actress.

title: Tumbbad
overview: A mythological story about a goddess who created the universe. The plot revolves around the consequences of worshipping Hastar the demon.

title: Drishyam
overview: A man goes to extreme lengths to save his family from the dark side of the law after they commit an accidental crime.

title: Sholay
overview: Two criminals are hired by a retired police officer to capture the ruthless bandit Gabbar Singh who terrorizes a small village.

title: Taare Zameen Par
overview: An 8 year old boy who is seemingly rebellious and lazy is actually a dyslexic child who is unable to comprehend conventional classroom methods.

title: Queen
overview: Rani a Delhi girl goes on her honeymoon alone after her fiance calls off their wedding. She finds herself and her independence.

title: Rang De Basanti
overview: A British filmmaker comes to India to make a documentary about freedom fighters. She gets a group of students to play the roles of revolutionaries.

title: Swades
overview: A successful project manager at NASA returns to India and becomes enamored with his nation's rural roots and takes steps to transform a small village.

title: Kabir Singh
overview: A short-tempered house surgeon gets devastated after his girlfriend is forced to marry someone else. He goes on a self-destructive path.

title: Uri The Surgical Strike
overview: The events surrounding the Indian Army's retaliation to the Uri attack in September 2016 in Pakistan Occupied Kashmir.

title: Raazi
overview: Based on the true story of an Indian spy who goes undercover as the wife of a Pakistani military officer during the 1971 war.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
overview: When Raj meets Simran in Europe they fall in love. But Simran's father has already arranged her marriage to someone else.

title: Dil Chahta Hai
overview: Three inseparable childhood friends are just out of college and face different challenges in their adult lives including love and relationships.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
overview: A clash between a coal mine owner and a local gang lord leads to a lengthy feud spanning several decades and generations.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
overview: A man with a devotion to Lord Hanuman helps a mute Pakistani girl who has been separated from her parents get back home to Pakistan.

title: Hera Pheri
overview: Three men get caught up in a kidnapping scheme when they receive a wrong phone call and attempt to swindle money from a criminal.

title: Munna Bhai MBBS
overview: A gangster decides to fulfill his father's dream of becoming a doctor. He enrolls in a medical college and his antics create chaos.

title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
overview: A terminally ill man befriends a young woman and her neighbor and teaches them how to live life to the fullest.

title: Veer Zaara
overview: The undying love story of an Indian Air Force pilot and a Pakistani girl who must fight against all odds to be together.

title: Masaan
overview: Four people living in the holy city of Varanasi deal with caste prejudice forbidden love and the pressure of societal expectations.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
overview: A man and his wife visit his ancestral home and are confronted with the ghost of a woman who died decades ago.

title: Sultan
overview: Sultan Ali Khan is a local wrestling champion in Haryana with the world at his feet as he grapples with the highs and lows of life.

title: Padmaavat
overview: The story of the Queen of Chittor Padmavati and the obsession of the Sultan of Delhi Alauddin Khilji for her.

title: Tanhaji
overview: Based on the true story of Tanhaji Malusare the military leader of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj who fought the Mughals.

title: Spider-Man No Way Home
overview: Peter Parker seeks help from Doctor Strange to make the world forget he is Spider-Man but the spell goes wrong unleashing multiverse villains.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up into an insane adventure in which she alone can save the multiverse by exploring other universes.
April 6th 1917. Two soldiers are assigned to race against time and deliver a message that will stop a deadly attack on their own men.

title: No Country for Old Men
overview: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earths mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.
